title: salvia tetragona
intro: Salvia tetragona, also known as American sage or Chiapas sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, colds, and flu. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. Salvia tetragona can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for various health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
